evidence.Annual_20Report_CHIP_2023_financial: Statements of Profit or Loss and Other Komprehensif Lain 3 Comprehensive Income Laporan Perubahan Ekuitas 4 Statements of Changes in Equity Laporan Arus Kas 5 Statements of Cash Flows Catatan atas Laporan Keuangan 6 Notes to the Financial Statements Laporan Auditor Independen Independent Auditors’ Report Nomor: 00014/2.1104/AU.1/04/1292-1/1/III/2024 Number: 00014/2.1104/AU.1/04/1292-1/1/III/2024 Pemegang Saham, Dewan Komisaris dan The Shareholders, Board of Commissioners and Direksi Directors PT Pelita Teknologi Global Tbk PT Pelita Teknologi Global Tbk Opini Opinion Kami telah mengaudit laporan keuangan PT Pelita We have audited the financial statements of Teknologi Global Tbk (“Perusahaan”), yang terdiri PT Pelita Teknologi Global Tbk (the "Company"), dari laporan posisi keuangan tanggal 31 Desember which comprise the statement of financial position 2023, serta laporan laba rugi dan penghasilan as of December 31, 2023, and the statement of komprehensif lain, laporan perubahan ekuitas dan profit or loss and other comprehensive income, the laporan arus kas untuk tahun yang berakhir pada statement of changes in equity, and statement of tanggal tersebut, serta catatan atas laporan cash flows for the year then ended, and notes to keuangan, termasuk informasi kebijakan akuntansi the financial statements, including material material. accounting policy information. Menurut opini kami, laporan keuangan terlampir In our opinion, the accompanying financial menyajikan secara wajar, dalam semua hal yang statements present fairly, in all material respects, material, posisi keuangan Perusahaan tanggal the financial position of the Company as of 31 Desember 2023, serta kinerja keuangan dan arus December 31, 2023, and its financial performance kasnya untuk tahun yang berakhir pada tanggal and its cash flows for the year then ended, in tersebut, sesuai dengan Standar Akuntansi accordance with Indonesian Financial Accounting Keuangan di Indonesia. Standards. Basis Opini Basis for Opinion Kami melaksanakan audit kami berdasarkan Standar We conducted our audit in accordance with the Audit yang ditetapkan oleh Institut Akuntan Publik Standards on Auditing established by the Indonesia. Tanggung jawab kami menurut standar Indonesian Institute of Certified Public tersebut diuraikan lebih lanjut dalam paragraf Accountants. Our responsibilities under those Tanggung Jawab Auditor terhadap Audit atas standards are further described in the Auditors’ Laporan Keuangan pada laporan kami. Kami Responsibilities for the Audit of the Financial independen terhadap Perusahaan berdasarkan Statements paragraph of our report. We are ketentuan etika yang relevan dalam audit kami atas independent of the Company in accordance with laporan keuangan di Indonesia, dan kami telah the ethical requirements that are relevant to our memenuhi tanggung jawab etika lainnya audit of the financial statements in Indonesia, and berdasarkan ketentuan tersebut. Kami yakin bahwa we have fulfilled our other ethical responsibilities in bukti audit yang telah kami peroleh adalah cukup accordance with these requirements. We believe dan tepat untuk menyediakan suatu basis bagi opini that the audit evidence we have obtained is audit kami. sufficient and appropriate to provide a basis for our opinion. Hal Audit Utama Key Audit Matters Hal audit utama adalah hal-hal yang, menurut Key audit matters are those matters that, in our pertimbangan profesional kami, merupakan hal yang professional judgement, are the most significance in paling signifikan dalam audit kami atas laporan our audit of the financial statements of the current keuangan periode kini. Hal tersebut disampaikan period. These matters were addressed in the context dalam konteks audit kami atas laporan keuangan of our audit of the financial statements as a whole, secara keseluruhan, dan dalam merumuskan opini and in forming our opinion thereon, and we do not kami atas laporan keuangan terkait, kami tidak provide a separate opinion on these key audit menyatakan suatu opini terpisah atas hal audit matters. utama tersebut. Hal audit utama yang teridentifikasi dalam audit kami The key audit matters identified in our audit are diuraikan sebagai berikut: outlined as follows: 1. Utang Lain-Lain kepada Pihak Berelasi Yang 1. Other Payables to Related Parties in Berjumlah Signifikan Significant Amounts Perusahaan memeroleh pendanaan yang berasal The Company obtained funding from Other dari Utang Lain-lain kepada Pihak Berelasi yang Liabilities to Related Parties which was used for digunakan untuk tambahan modal kerja terutama additional working capital mainly for the dalam rangka pembelian bahan baku, purchase of raw materials, payments to pembayaran kepada karyawan, penyewaan employees, factory rentals, and purchase of pabrik, dan pembelian aset tetap. Pada tanggal fixed assets. As of December 31, 2023, Other 31 Desember 2023, Utang Lain-Lain Pihak Liabilities to Related Parties was recorded of Berelasi tercatat sebesar Rp 19.160.337.792 Rp 19,160,337,792 or 35% of total liabilities in atau 35% dari total liabilitas dalam laporan posisi the statement of financial position. keuangan. Respon kami atas Hal Audit Utama: Our response to Key Audit Matter: • Kami memahami dan mengevaluasi perjanjian • We understood and evaluated the payable utang-piutang antara Perusahaan dengan and receivable agreements between the pihak berelasi dan memastikan bahwa Company and related parties and confirmed transaksi tersebut wajar; that the transactions were reasonable; • Kami melakukan prosedur konfirmasi dan • We performed confirmation procedures and memperoleh jawaban konfirmasi dari pihak obtained confirmation replies from the terkait atas Utang Pihak Berelasi per related parties on the Related Party 31 Desember 2023; Payables as of December 31, 2023; • Kami memeriksa keabsahan penerimaan kas • We checked the validity of cash receipts dari Pihak berelasi ke bukti penerimaan kas from related parties to the Company’s cash dan rekening koran Perusahaan; receipts and bank statements; • Kami memeriksa ketepatan perlakuan • We checked the appropriateness of the akuntansi yang diterapkan dan kecukupan accounting treatment applied and the pengungkapan pada Catatan 13 atas laporan adequacy of the disclosures in Note 13 to keuangan. the financial statements. 2. Uang Muka Penjualan Yang Berjumlah 2. Significant Amount of Customer Advances Signifikan Perusahaan menerima Uang muka penjualan dari The Company received a customer advance from PT Global Interaksi atas penjualan sim card pada PT Global Interaction for the sale of sim cards in tahun 2023 senilai Rp 15.565.000.000. Uang 2023 amounting to Rp 15,565,000,000. The Muka penjualan terjadi dikarenakan Pelanggan customer advance occurred because the sudah terlebih dahulu membayarkan atas customer had already paid for the sale of sim penjualan sim card tersebut dan barang dikirim cards and the goods were shipped in January pada bulan Januari 2024. 2024.
